description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this purple bag from nike will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go shopping, for a movie or to college. It's large enough to accommodate all your essentials and neat enough to get you loads of attention from strangers!MeasurementHeight: 37 cmWidth: 42 cmDepth: 7 cmCapacity: 16 litresMade of 100% polyester on the outside with 100% nylon lining on the inside for enhanced durability and styleOne main roomy zippered compartment with an inner zippered pocket to hold essentialsTwo long handles with a press buttoned closure for carrying easeBranded zippers and sliders for easy usenike Swoosh printed on the front for brandingCareDo not machine washRub surface with damp clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not bleach, line dry, iron or dry clean
